body_txt: Different cultures have had different ideas of what exactly a rainbow is or represents, many of which were formed long before science solved the puzzle (a reflection, refraction and dispersion of light through water droplets). One common idea is that this arch of color is used as a pathway or vehicle by otherworldly beings. This form of Not Quite Flight can be read in a number of ways; Maybe they are Sky Surfing , treating the front-end of a rainbow as a surf-board and moving across the ocean of clouds. Perhaps the rest of the rainbow is a vapor trail left behind as they move. Maybe rainbows are giant snakes that eat elephants and people, and the user is just their owner, the snake their mighty steed. Sub-Trope of Everything's Better with Rainbows , Hard Light , and Rainbow Manipulation . Compare with Flying on a Cloud , Ride the Lightning , and Stairway to Heaven . See also All Your Colors Combined , Rainbow Lite , Alternate Rainbow , and Rainbow Motif .
